# Vehicle State Machine

> Tracks the real-time operational state of a connected vehicle (online, driving, charging, asleep, offline, updating) by polling a vehicle API and persisting state transitions.

**Category:** Asset · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** vehicle · telemetry · state-machine · ev · fleet · polling

## What this does

Tracks the real-time operational state of a connected vehicle (online, driving, charging, asleep, offline, updating) by polling a vehicle API and persisting state transitions.

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **vehicle_id** *(text, required)* — Vehicle ID
- **current_state** *(select, required)* — Current State
- **shift_state** *(select, optional)* — Shift State
- **charging_state** *(select, optional)* — Charging State
- **is_sentry_mode** *(boolean, optional)* — Sentry Mode Active
- **is_preconditioning** *(boolean, optional)* — Preconditioning Active
- **is_dog_mode** *(boolean, optional)* — Dog Mode Active
- **is_user_present** *(boolean, optional)* — Occupant Present
- **software_update_status** *(text, optional)* — Software Update Status
- **state_start_date** *(datetime, required)* — State Start Date
- **suspend_after_idle_min** *(number, optional)* — Suspend After Idle (minutes)

## What must be true

- **polling_interval_by_state:** Polling interval varies by state — driving ~2.5s, charging ~5s, online/updating ~15s, asleep ~30s, offline exponential backoff starting at 5s up to 30s maximum
- **suspended_state_manual_only:** A vehicle cannot transition from suspended state due to API signals; only explicit operator action resumes logging
- **sleep_eligibility_all_conditions:** Sleep requires ALL of these to be false simultaneously — sentry mode, preconditioning, dog mode, user present, doors open, battery heater active, software download in progress
- **offline_during_drive_timeout:** When offline during a drive the system maintains the driving state for up to 15 minutes using the last known position before auto-completing the trip
- **state_records_open_end_date:** State records store state_start_date and state_end_date — the current state always has a null end date

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Vehicle Transitions To Driving** — when current_state eq "online"; shift_state in ["D","N","R"], then Vehicle enters driving state; trip recording begins.
- **Vehicle Transitions To Charging** — when current_state eq "online"; charging_state in ["Starting","Charging"], then Vehicle enters charging state; charging session recording begins.
- **Vehicle Falls Asleep** — when vehicle is online and idle duration exceeds suspend_after_idle_min; all sleep eligibility conditions are met, then Vehicle enters sleep state; polling interval reduced.
- **Vehicle Goes Offline** — when API request fails or times out for the vehicle, then Vehicle marked offline; polling continues with backoff.
- **Vehicle Wakes Up** — when current_state in ["asleep","offline"]; API poll returns a valid online response, then Vehicle transitions to online; normal polling resumes.

## Errors it can return

- `VEHICLE_API_UNREACHABLE` — Vehicle is not responding. Polling will continue with backoff.
- `VEHICLE_SUSPENDED` — Vehicle logging is suspended. Resume logging to track activity.

## Connects to

- **vehicle-trip-segmentation** *(required)*
- **ev-charging-session** *(required)*
- **vehicle-sleep-wake-detection** *(extends)*
